
::: {.paper-table}
**Table 15. A.22 COVID-19**

| Intervention | Effect | Source |
| --- | --- | --- |
| mRNA vaccines (phase 3, short-term) | 94–95% RRR; ARR<1.2% | Pfizer; Moderna trials |
| Dexamethasone (ventilated patients) | 35% mortality reduction; NNT=8 | RECOVERY trial |
| Medical/surgical masks | RR=0.95 (NS) | Cochrane [@jefferson2023] |
| Masks in Bangladesh NORM trial | 9.5–11.5% reduction in seroprevalence | Abaluck et al. |
:::
